rows.label: qev085807_MSG0001
rows.name: The enemies we want you to defeat are the Crack Pagurus infesting this valley![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085807_MSG0002
rows.name: Once they're gone, installing the Data Probe will be a breeze![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085807_MSG0003
rows.name:
Please go and decisively strike them down!
We're counting on you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085807_MSG0004
rows.name:
Wait, don't tell me...
You defeated the native creatures for us!?
As expected of the rumored Elma team![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev085807_MSG0005
rows.name: We'll head over as soon as we're ready, so please go on ahead to the hill with a view of the sea, just past the valley![ST:wait ]
